lines.speaker: Bugs
lines.text: Dad says you can get a lift to Karamja with us if you want? But you's gives us two chompy first!

lines.speaker: Ogre boat
lines.text: You's got no chompies...no boatsie trips!

lines.speaker: Bugs
lines.text: Dad says you can get a lift back with us if you want? But you's gives us two glug-glugs herbies first!

lines.speaker: Bugs
lines.text: Dad sez yous not bringin' da rummy stuff...das bad stuffsies un we get in big bads.

lines.speaker: Ogre boat
lines.text: You's got no glug-glugs herbies...no boatsie trips!
